display.purpose: Page-level section titles and company name anchors. Two per page maximum.

headline.purpose: Section headers within a dashboard page — 'Portfolio Overview', 'Pipeline by Stage'.

title.purpose: Card headings, modal titles, sidebar section labels.

body.purpose: Table cells, form content, running descriptions. Cap at 70ch in reading contexts.

label.purpose: Section labels, column headers, metadata tags. Always uppercase, wide-tracked.

shadows.name: refined
shadows.purpose: Baseline card elevation at rest. Separates content surface from page canvas.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Interactive cards in hover state; selected items one step above canvas rest.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Floating panels, dropdowns, date pickers — surfaces that have left the document flow.

shadows.name: hover
shadows.purpose: Dragged kanban cards; modals at peak elevation. Interaction-in-progress tier.

motion.name: fade-in
motion.purpose: Page section entrance. Applied once on mount; never loops.

motion.name: slide-up
motion.purpose: Card and modal entrance. translateY(12px) to 0 with opacity 0 to 1.

motion.name: transition-colors
motion.value: color 200ms ease-out, background-color 200ms ease-out, border-color 200ms ease-out
motion.purpose: All interactive state changes (hover, focus, active).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action trigger. Used for create, save, and confirm actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background-color: #4a6a8f; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); transition: background-color 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #1a2b44; box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.16); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px rgba(90, 127, 168, 0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Non-destructive secondary actions alongside a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background-color: #f4f6f8; color: #384854; padding: 10px 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #dce2e8; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms ease-out, border-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: #e8ecf0; border-color: #c4ccd4; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px rgba(90, 127, 168, 0.4); } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-hierarchy tertiary actions. Used in table rows, card headers, and toolbars.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background-color: transparent; color: #5a7fa8; padding: 10px 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms ease-out, color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: rgba(90, 127, 168, 0.08); color: #4a6a8f; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px rgba(90, 127, 168, 0.4); }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Primary content container. Groups related information with a clear boundary.
components.html:
Portfolio Summary

12 active companies across 3 fund strategies
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e8ecf0; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); transition: box-shadow 200ms ease-out; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); border-color: #dce2e8; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8ecf0; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #384854; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { padding: 24px; }

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: Single KPI display. Use sparingly — only for the 3-4 most critical top-line numbers.
components.html:
Portfolio ARR

$42.3M

+18% YoY
components.css: .ds-metric-card { background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e8ecf0; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); padding: 24px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; transition: box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-metric-card--primary { border-top: 2px solid #5a7fa8; } .ds-metric-card--active { border-top: 2px solid #15803d; } .ds-metric-card--watchlist { border-top: 2px solid #d97706; } .ds-metric-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #8c96a2; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin: 0; } .ds-metric-value { font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: #384854; margin: 12px 0 0; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-metric-sub { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #8c96a2; margin: 8px 0 0; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Portfolio company status indicator. Always semantic — color encodes meaning, not aesthetics.
components.html: ActiveWatchlistExitedWritten Off
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; text-transform: capitalize; } .ds-badge--active { background-color: #f0fdf4; color: #15803d; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #bbf7d0; } .ds-badge--watchlist { background-color: #fffbeb; color: #b45309; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #fde68a; } .ds-badge--exited { background-color: #eff6ff; color: #1d4ed8; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #bfdbfe; } .ds-badge--written-off { background-color: #fff1f2; color: #be123c; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #fecdd3; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form text field. Used for all single-line text inputs in forms and search.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #545e6e; } .ds-field-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 1rem; font-family: inherit; background-color: #f4f6f8; border: 1px solid #dce2e8; border-radius: 8px; color: #384854; transition: border-color 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-field-input::placeholder { color: #8c96a2; } .ds-field-input:focus { border-color: #5a7fa8; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(90, 127, 168, 0.2); background-color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: The wayfinding voice throughout the app. Used as section headers, table column labels, and metadata titles.
components.css: .ds-section-label { display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #8c96a2; margin-bottom: 12px; }

components.name: Health Score
components.description: Portfolio company health indicator. 0-100 numeric score with semantic color encoding.
components.css: .ds-health-score { display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-health-value { font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1; } .ds-health-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #8c96a2; } .ds-health-score--high .ds-health-value { color: #15803d; } .ds-health-score--medium .ds-health-value { color: #b45309; } .ds-health-score--low .ds-health-value { color: #dc2626; }

narrative.overview:
This is the private, well-ordered room where serious decisions happen. The aesthetic is one of quiet authority: every element has a reason to be there, nothing decorates for its own sake, and the whole system projects the confidence of a fund that has done its homework. Think a well-organized investment office — precise, structured, unhurried.

The platform resists the impulse toward visual novelty. There are no gradient accents, no hero-metric vanity cards, no decorative chart animations. What replaces them is disciplined typographic hierarchy, calibrated spacing, and a color system that uses restraint as its signal of sophistication.

Dark mode is a first-class citizen. The dark surface carries the same structure and precision as the light surface — same contrast ratios, same spatial logic.
keyCharacteristics: Serif display type (Georgia) for page-level headings; clean system sans for all operational text
Steel-blue primary acting as a precise signal, never a flood
Borders and backgrounds create hierarchy before shadows are needed
Four shadow tiers reserved for genuine structural depth
Status colors communicate facts, not aesthetics
Section labels in uppercase, wide-tracked, muted — consistent wayfinding register throughout

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: The primary steel-blue appears on ≤15% of any given screen surface. Its presence marks interaction or selection. If everything is blue, nothing is.

rules.name: The Status-Only Rule
rules.body: Emerald, amber, and red are reserved for status indicators. They do not appear as decorative accents, chart colors, or background fills.

rules.name: The Serif Anchor Rule
rules.body: Georgia appears only at display and headline level. Never in body text, table cells, form fields, or badge labels.

rules.name: The Label Uniformity Rule
rules.body: Section labels are always 0.75rem, semibold, uppercase, tracked at 0.08em, in neutral-muted. Deviating from this pattern — even once — breaks the rhythm.

rules.name: The Structural-Only Rule
rules.body: Shadows mark depth, not importance. Nested shadows are prohibited.

rules.name: The Flat-Text Rule
rules.body: Text, badges, icons, and labels cast no shadows. text-shadow is not part of this system.

dos: Do use Georgia exclusively for display and headline level (text-3xl and above). System sans handles everything below.
Do use the section-title pattern (uppercase, 0.75rem, semibold, wide-tracked, neutral-muted) consistently for all section labels.
Do use status colors (emerald, amber, red, blue) only when communicating portfolio status.
Do keep the steel-blue primary accent below 15% of any screen surface.
Do use the four shadow tiers with structural intent.
Do use 1px borders (all sides) on cards.
Do size buttons consistently: px-4 py-2.5 text-sm (md) or px-3 py-2 text-xs (sm).
Do left-align text columns and right-align numeric columns in data tables.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion for all animations.
donts: Don't use purple/teal gradients, gradient text, or gradient accent fills anywhere in the platform.
Don't build hero-metric cards: big number, small label, gradient top accent.
Don't use identical icon-heading-text card grids.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use text-shadow or nested shadows.
Don't add decorative chart animations that loop or re-animate on scroll.
Don't apply shadow-elevated or shadow-hover to cards at rest.
Don't put rounded-full pills with pastel fills, playful illustrations, or consumer-app micro-copy in product screens.
Don't use Georgia below headline size.
Don't introduce a new color outside the defined palette without assigning it a semantic role.
